paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.18, with a 4.13% change versus the prior close and a -28.7% change over a window of 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of a US$375 million offering of 5.00% senior convertible notes due 2031 and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns. News sources such as simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance have reported on these developments.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there has been 1 Form 4 filing and 6 new social posts in the last 24 hours, with users discussing the stock's future and referencing upcoming events.
